hypotheses.name: SV1 feature-shuffle and gene-label-shuffle null
hypotheses.method: SVD of layer-11 4803x512 mean-centered embedding. Project 209 named genes onto SV1. Run GO BP enrichment (Fisher exact, top-25% vs bottom-25%, 296 terms). Two null controls: (1) feature-column shuffle (100 reps, permute 512 dimensions) — revealed degenerate null (L2-norm invariant); (2) gene-label shuffle (500 reps, permute gene→embedding row assignment). Primary test: gene-label shuffle. Observed: GO:0005615 (extracellular space) OR=6.37, p=0.000257. Label-shuffle null p5=0.00292, empirical p=0.004.
hypotheses.next_action: Extend SV1 label-shuffle null across all 12 layers to confirm extracellular axis specificity throughout the network. Also test SV2/SV3 for additional biological axes.

hypotheses.name: Layer-wise SVD trajectory (12 layers)
hypotheses.method: SVD of full 4803x512 embedding matrix at each of 12 layers. Track SV1/SV2 ratio, SV1 variance explained, effective rank, and GO BP enrichment (Fisher exact) for named-gene SV1 top-25% vs bottom-25% quartile. 296 GO terms tested per layer.
hypotheses.result_value: SV1/SV2 L0=4.07→L11=7.70; 5x threshold crossed at layer 2; SV1 explains 57.2%→93.2% variance; extracellular space (GO:0005615) top-hit in 8/12 layers; GO_p < 0.006 in all 12 layers
hypotheses.next_action: Run gene-label shuffle null at each layer to confirm GO enrichment specificity is maintained throughout. Characterize the transient deviations (layer 3: mitochondrion; layers 7-8: ER lumen) as potentially meaningful functional transitions.

hypotheses.name: Drift gene-label-shuffle null + SV1 negative-pole GO enrichment
hypotheses.method: Feature-column shuffle for drift (degenerate: L2 norm permutation-invariant, replaced by gene-label shuffle). Gene-label shuffle (500 reps): permute gene→embedding assignment, recompute drift-based GO enrichment. Also: run GO enrichment for SV1 bottom-quartile vs top-quartile named genes at layer 11.
hypotheses.result_value: drift obs_p=0.00198 (GO:0000981 TF/RNAPolII, OR=2.75, n_sig=15), null_p5=0.00082, empirical_p=0.124, PASS=False. SV1 bottom-pole: GO:0005829 (cytosol), p=0.010, OR=2.96
hypotheses.next_action: Drift TF enrichment is nominally positive but does not clear the gene-label shuffle null at p5 threshold (empirical p=0.124). Retire drift-GO enrichment as primary evidence; retain as supporting trend only. SV1 negative-pole cytosol finding corroborates the extracellular/cytosol biological axis.

null_methodology_note: Feature-column shuffle is degenerate for L2-norm-based statistics (permutation-invariant). Gene-label shuffle (permute gene→embedding-row assignment) is the appropriate null for testing whether specific gene identities drive GO enrichment results. All prior iterations using feature shuffle for L2 drift should be re-interpreted with this caveat.
